# Priorities Requirements Checklist: UC-27 Set Constraint Priorities

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, and completeness of the constraint-priority requirements before implementation and review
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: [spec.md](/home/thaia/ECE493Group19/specs/027-branch-constraint-priorities/spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are the eligible constraints for priority assignment explicitly defined, including whether all saved constraint types can be prioritized? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, Spec §FR-010]
- [x] CHK002 Are the requirements explicit about whether every eligible constraint must receive a priority or whether documented defaults are permitted for unranked constraints? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK003 Are the save and replace semantics for the full priority set fully defined for create, update, and re-save scenarios? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-004]
- [x] CHK004 Are the requirements complete for what happens to saved priorities when their referenced constraints are deleted, hidden, or otherwise unavailable? [Completeness, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-012]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is the 1-to-5 scale defined unambiguously, including whether lower numbers always mean higher priority in every ranking context? [Clarity, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK006 Is "displayed constraint order" precise enough to determine which order governs tie-breaking after sorting, filtering, or editing the editor view? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-008, Spec §Tie-Breaking Rule]
- [x] CHK007 Is "outside the selected term" defined clearly enough to distinguish wrong-term references from deleted or stale constraints? [Clarity, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK008 Is "visible explanation" specific enough to evaluate message quality consistently across invalid-value and save-failure scenarios? [Measurability, Spec §NFR-002, Spec §SC-002]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK009 Are the priority-model requirements consistent between the clarification note, user stories, functional requirements, assumptions, and key entities? [Consistency, Spec §Clarifications, Spec §FR-002, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK010 Are tie-handling requirements consistent between User Story 3, the edge-case section, FR-008, and SC-003? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-008, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK011 Do the save-failure requirements align across User Story 3, FR-009, NFR-001, and SC-004 without implying contradictory partial-save behavior? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-009, Spec §SC-004]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK012 Are the success criteria measurable without depending on hidden implementation details about the ranking engine? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec §SC-001, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK013 Can reviewers objectively determine what qualifies as "used during later schedule ranking" from the written requirements alone? [Measurability, Spec §User Story 1, Spec §FR-007, Spec §SC-001]
- [x] CHK014 Is the repeatability requirement for equal-priority ranking outcomes measurable enough to distinguish stable tie-breaking from accidental consistency? [Clarity, Spec §SC-003]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK015 Are alternate-flow requirements defined for editing an existing saved priority set after the student’s constraint list changes? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK016 Are recovery-flow requirements defined for what the student can do immediately after a save failure besides being told the previous priorities remain unchanged? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3, Spec §FR-009]
- [x] CHK017 Are requirements specified for switching between registration terms when both constraints and priority sets exist in multiple terms? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-011]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK018 Are requirements explicit for mixed-validity submissions where one priority is missing and another is out of range in the same save attempt? [Edge Case, Spec §User Story 2, Spec §FR-005, Spec §FR-006]
- [x] CHK019 Are requirements defined for what happens when the editor display order changes after priorities were saved but before ranking is run? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-008]
- [x] CHK020 Are concurrent edit scenarios intentionally excluded or missing for the same student's priority set in multiple sessions? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases, Spec §FR-013]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [x] CHK021 Are accessibility requirements sufficiently specified beyond keyboard access, including how tie-policy explanations and validation errors are surfaced? [Coverage, Spec §NFR-002, Spec §NFR-003]
- [x] CHK022 Are privacy and authorization requirements complete for saved priority settings and their linked constraints beyond basic owner-only visibility? [Completeness, Spec §FR-013, Spec §NFR-004]
- [x] CHK023 Are performance requirements defined for ranking scenarios that include many equal-priority values as clearly as for successful saves? [Coverage, Spec §NFR-001, Spec §NFR-005, Spec §SC-005]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK024 Are assumptions about existing saved constraints and available term data validated by explicit fallback requirements when those dependencies are missing or stale? [Assumption, Dependency, Spec §Dependencies, Spec §FR-012]
- [x] CHK025 Does the spec clearly separate guaranteed ranking behavior from planning assumptions about how the ranking engine consumes priorities? [Consistency, Assumption, Spec §Assumptions, Spec §FR-007, Plan §Summary]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
- Review on 2026-03-11 tightened the spec around eligible-constraint scope, full-set replacement semantics, tie-order precision, mixed-invalid submissions, stale constraint review, concurrent edits, accessibility wording, and measurable save outcomes.
